headline: US-Iran Military Escalation Dominates as Pentagon Targets AI Company

topStories.title: Iran's Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei Reported Dead Following US-Israeli Strikes
topStories.summary: Multiple sources report the death of Iran's Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei amid escalating military operations. NBC News, Al Jazeera, The Hill, Axios, and Foreign Policy are covering developments, though confirmation status varies across outlets.

topStories.title: US and Israel Conduct Military Strikes Against Iran, Iran Responds with Missile Attacks
topStories.summary: Coordinated US-Israeli military operations against Iran have prompted Iranian missile retaliation, according to ABC News, The Guardian US, Breitbart, Wired, and Axios. The exchange marks a significant escalation in regional tensions.

topStories.title: Congress Faces War Powers Votes Following US Strikes on Iran
topStories.summary: Congressional leadership is preparing war powers resolutions in response to US military action against Iran. Fox Politics, Axios, UPI, Al Jazeera, and Daily Wire report on legislative responses to the military escalation.

topStories.title: Pentagon Designates Anthropic as Supply-Chain Risk, Trump Orders Government to Stop Using AI Company
topStories.summary: The Pentagon has classified AI company Anthropic as a supply-chain security risk, with President Trump directing federal agencies to cease using the company's services. Axios, TechCrunch, Daily Wire, Foreign Policy, and Vox are reporting on the directive.

topStories.title: US President Trump Orders Military Strike Against Iranian Nuclear Facilities
topStories.summary: President Trump has authorized military strikes targeting Iranian nuclear infrastructure, according to NBC News, Axios, The Guardian US, Vox, and Breitbart. The action represents a significant escalation in US-Iran tensions.

emergingThemes: US-Iran military escalation across multiple fronts
Congressional oversight of executive war powers
National security implications of AI technology partnerships
Supply chain security in emerging technologies
notableShifts: Iran conflict moving from diplomatic tensions to active military engagement
Congressional war powers debate shifting from theoretical to immediate legislative action
AI security concerns expanding from data privacy to national security classification
Middle East regional dynamics potentially reshaping with reported Iranian leadership changes
